message: Stage -1.2 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start runner=codex/gpt-5.5 status=completed

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): Case 6b (unsalvageable conjecture fast-path) — Stage 0.5 reject is at the conjecture level, not derivation: reviewer's K=2,n=4 witness refutes Conjectures 1 and 2 (units 2,3 have four distinct neighbor-assignment conditional means that cannot be represented by a two-label exposure map), and the only surviving positive result is a finite Farkas-style audit lemma that fails the flagship novelty floor. Re-deriving on the same .tex would burn budget; the conjecture itself is the defect.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): Case 6b (Stage 0.5 reject fast-path) — reviewer's reject is conjecture-level: `proposal_promise_gap=tier_genuinely_below`. The two advertised flagship conjectures (strict-cellwise frontier, joint nonrectangularity as open-set claims) are not proved; only the specific K=2,n=4 witness P^star was refuted (which does not refute the generic claims). The salvageable positive content (endpoint-certificate Farkas + exhaustive-enumeration dichotomy) is intrinsically below the flagship floor — it opens no new regime, names no new random-set object, and has no algorithmic complexity beyond brute force. Re-deriving on the same .tex would burn budget producing another below-floor certificate; the conjecture itself is the defect, not the derivation.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): Case 6b — Stage 0.5 reject fast-path: the reviewer's grounds are conjecture-level (Conjectures 1 and 2 are refuted by the artifact's own audit since the advertised P-star witness has empty K=2 sparse feasible class — unit 2's four distinct a=0 neighbor-state means 0.33/0.44/0.40/0.51 cannot be represented by two exposure labels, so the claimed 1/40 gaps are not valid). The only positive result that survives is a finite Farkas/enumeration certificate, which the reviewer classifies as below the flagship floor (subfield/incremental). This is kernel_substituted, not a derivation slip — re-deriving on the same .tex would either re-discover the same refutation or yield the same sub-flagship certificate.
Stage -0.5 NO-PASS — pivot budget exhausted (5 angles tried)
